# Paul Brodner

> Enterprise Test Architect and AI-augmented engineering practitioner. Personal blog covering AI-driven testing, multi-agent systems, MCP, and quality architecture in regulated healthcare environments.

Paul Brodner has {{ site.time | date: "%Y" | minus: 2008 }}+ years of experience in software quality and engineering, specialising in AI-augmented engineering, multi-agent orchestration, and enterprise quality governance in FDA-regulated clinical trial technology environments. He works at the intersection of AI engineering, enterprise test architecture, and healthcare technology.

## Profile

- [Profile]({{ site.url }}/profile): Full professional background — work history, AI stack, certifications, and expertise areas
